creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Neal Nelson wrote on 19.10.2011 11:33:
> Hi.
>
> This patch also needs to work for  x11-toolkits/py-wxPython28-unicode too for it to be committed. Does this build OK too?
>

Hi, Neal.

-unicode does not require any changes, because it's just Makefile, that 
includes primary Makefile from main wxPython port. Also as you can see i 
posted build logs for all ports, including py-wxPython28-unicode:

http://host5.webstroy.ru/tb/8.2/py27-wxPython-unicode-2.8.12.1.log

It builds fine too.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
